cells.value: At a glance - gated POP corpus & confirmation coverage
% of in-scope $; manual-review confirmation of the weighted pool
POP_Location_Parse - 658-row place-of-performance corpus (drives the per-stream POP coefficients)
POP_Source_Audit - risk-weighted manual confirmation of the POP corpus
Tier 1 - top-$ actions covering ~90-95% of the weighted pool; all $250M+; all $100M+
Tier 2 - redacted / missing-$ ; all MYP masters ; all AP/LLTM / EOQ actions
Tier 3 - POP not summing ~100% (high unparsed >1-2%) ; GFE / MIB-suspect ; any coefficient-mover
Confirmed rows = gated AND in-scope (non-GFE) AND manual_review_status<>unresolved
dropped from BOTH base and corpus (strict v5)
the corpus the coefficient is measured over
excluded from coeff until resolved (0 in sub corpus)
in-scope; x 35.0% BC supplier coefficient (BPMI nuclear excluded, Phase 3)
gated; MYP-type redaction; 0 in sub corpus (DDG concern)
% of in-scope $; target ~90-95%+ (100% = all gated confirmed)
$12.4B Va Block VI LLTM as a share of the gated pool
in-scope conf = BC + AP; every in-scope confirmed action is BC or AP/LLTM
High-$ action register (top 10 by $ - Tier-1 manually-confirmed)
